sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5753" key="a)mfigo/htos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφιγόητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n5753.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bewailed all round,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Κωκυτοῦ ὕδωρ</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.700</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>(<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diod.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
